pageDescription: Manage committee and personal account blocklists
committeeDescription: These accounts have been blacklisted by the Bitshares committee. This list is maintained on-chain and updated periodically.
addUserDialogDescription: Search for an account to add to your personal blocklist. Blocked accounts will be hidden from your view across the application.
usersEmptyDescription: You haven't blocked any accounts yet. Block accounts to hide them from your view.
blockConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to block this account? They will be hidden from your view across the application.
